serverInfo.name: EzBiz Government Contracting Intelligence
serverInfo.description: AI-powered federal contracting intelligence MCP server for Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP client. 4 tools: search federal contract opportunities, analyze agency spending, competitor win analysis, set-aside tracking. Real-time SAM.gov, USASpending.gov, and FPDS data powered by GPT-4o. Free tier available — 10 API calls/month. Built for GovCon firms, small business federal contractors, proposal writers, and BD teams. Built by EzBiz Services.

tools.name: search_contracts
tools.description: Search federal contract opportunities on SAM.gov — filter by NAICS code, set-aside type, agency, dollar range, and keywords. Returns active solicitations with due dates, contact info, and bid requirements.

set_aside.description: Set-aside type: 8a, HUBZone, SDVOSB, WOSB, SBA, or all

tools.name: analyze_agency
tools.description: Analyze a federal agency's spending patterns and contracting behavior — top contractors, spending trends, preferred NAICS codes, contract types, and upcoming opportunities.

tools.name: competitor_win_analysis
tools.description: Analyze a competitor's federal contract wins — awarded contracts, agencies they work with, contract values, NAICS codes, and win patterns.

naics.description: NAICS code to filter wins by

tools.name: set_aside_tracker
tools.description: Track small business set-aside opportunities across federal agencies — 8(a), HUBZone, SDVOSB, WOSB, and SBA set-asides with trending categories and agency compliance.

set_aside_type.description: Set-aside type: 8a, HUBZone, SDVOSB, WOSB, SBA, or all
